summary: Iteration 110: All 4 bug fixes VERIFIED. Backend tests 12/12 passed. 1) Admin habits CRUD working (404 fixed), 2) Honorary licensee account_value=$6530 (not stale $5000), 3) Account value consistent across all endpoints, 4) Manager_traded=true for 20 trading days, false for non-trading days, no weekends included.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ calculate_honorary_licensee_value() in /app/backend/utils/calculations.py correctly uses quarterly compounding
✅ Master admin trades filtered with did_not_trade: {$ne: True} to exclude non-trading entries
✅ GET /api/admin/members/{id} returns dynamic account_value=$6530 for honorary licensee (not stale starting_amount)
✅ GET /api/admin/members/{id}/simulate uses calculate_honorary_licensee_value() for honorary licensees
✅ GET /api/admin/licenses/{id}/projections correctly shows manager_traded=true for 20 trade days
✅ Admin habits CRUD endpoints working: GET, POST, DELETE all return 200
✅ Account value is CONSISTENT: $6530 across member details, simulate, and projections endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ prefixed habit during testing, deactivated after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 profit tracker bugs are now fixed: 1) Admin habits CRUD returns 200 (POST was returning 404), 2) Honorary licensee Rizza Miles account_value dynamically calculated as $6530 using calculate_honorary_licensee_value(), 3) Account value consistent across /api/admin/members/{id}, /api/admin/members/{id}/simulate, and /api/admin/licenses/{id}/projections, 4) manager_traded column correctly shows true for 20 trading days (Jan 20 - Feb 16 2026 weekdays) and false for non-trading days, weekends excluded.

verified_features.verification: 20 days with manager_traded=true, 262 days with manager_traded=false

bug_1_manager_traded_column.description: Manager Traded column incorrectly shows 'x' on days the manager has traded
bug_1_manager_traded_column.evidence: Projections API returns manager_traded=true for 20 trading days (Jan 20-Feb 16), manager_traded=false for non-trading days

bug_2_account_value_sync.description: Account value not syncing between Profit Tracker page and Dashboard
bug_2_account_value_sync.evidence: Member details, simulate, and projections all return $6530 account_value

bug_3_profit_stuck_at_zero.description: Profit stuck at $0 despite 20 trading days

bug_4_admin_habits_404.description: Failed to Save Habit 404 error for admin habit CRUD
bug_4_admin_habits_404.evidence: POST /api/admin/habits returns 200 and successfully creates habits
